129496.description: Jora Pelbrook the 2nd and Arno Noreria formed a household in Nordrim.

129497.headline: Junwatch Manor was built.
129497.description: Junwatch Manor, a residence, was built in Junwatch under Lorn Oststone.

129498.headline: Oststone Household was founded.
129498.description: Oststone Household was founded in Junwatch by Lorn Oststone and Piera Kordmoor.

129499.headline: Oststone Household Home was claimed.
129499.description: Lorn Oststone claimed home in Junwatch. Its recorded value was 30.4.
